$jsonSchema.title: Intervention
$jsonSchema.description: Therapeutic intervention scoped to exactly one trial and one arm. dosage embedded. target_gene/protein nullable (e.g. placebo has none).

trial_id.description: Parent trial. An intervention has no meaning without trial+arm context.

arm_label.description: Must match an arm_label embedded in the parent trial document.

name.description: Generic or brand name, e.g. Pembrolizumab, Placebo saline.

mechanism.description: Short mechanism of action, e.g. PD-1 checkpoint inhibitor.

amount.description: Null for multi-drug regimens (e.g. CHOP), cell therapies, or observation-only arms with no single dose.

target_gene.description: HGNC symbol, e.g. EGFR. Null if not applicable.

target_protein.description: UniProt-style name. Null if not applicable.
